signIn.title: Studio
signIn.subtitle: Sign in with your Inigo account to continue.
signIn.errorFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.

access.deniedBody: Creator Studio is currently available by invitation. If you believe you should have access, please reach out to the Inigo team.
access.errorTitle: We could not confirm your access
access.errorBody: Something went wrong while checking your access. Please try again in a moment.
access.signInDifferent: Sign in with a different account

home.createTitle: Create guided experiences that help people practice.
home.createLede: Pass something meaningful forward through Inigo.
home.sessionsLede: Pick up where you left off.

create.guidedSessionDesc: Create a guided practice for the Inigo library.
create.insightDesc: Share a reflection, note, or teaching.
create.practiceDesc: Share a simple breathing, movement, or daily exercise.
create.resourceDesc: Share something meaningful: music, recipe, book, or ritual.

sessions.emptyText: When you create a guided session, it will appear here so you can pick up where you left off.
sessions.emptyFilteredText: Try another filter, or create something new in the Create tab.

createForm.title: Create guided session
createForm.lede: Start with the basics. You can refine everything later.
createForm.defaultsNote: Instructor, environment, and music are set to calm defaults for now — you can refine them later.
createForm.successBody: "{title}" is saved as a draft. Continue setup now, or come back later from Studio.

publish.cooldownWithTime: You can publish your next session after {time}.
publish.cooldownNoTime: You can publish your next session again soon.
publish.limitTitle: You've reached your current publishing limit.
publish.limitBody: You can archive an existing published session or contact Inigo.
publish.readyLede: Everything required is ready. Publish to add this session to the Inigo library.
publish.notReadyLede: Complete the missing items before publishing.
publish.confirmText: Your session will go live in Inigo. After publishing, you can't change the content — you can still view and share the session page.
publish.noAccess: You do not have access to publish this session.
publish.publishedText: This session is live in Inigo. In Studio V1, published sessions are read-only — you can still view and share this page anytime.

editor.noAccessEdit: You do not have access to edit this session.
editor.contentReadonly: Shared and archived sessions are read-only in Studio V1.
editor.welcomeHint: Add your audio next — it is required before you can publish.

overview.title: Overview
overview.lede: A quick read on what you are creating — details live in Content.
overview.draftIncompleteLede: Complete the steps below to publish.

fields.title: Title
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: What will someone feel or learn in this session?

hints.description: What someone will feel or learn. This appears in the library and when sharing.
hints.voice: Preferred voice style for guided audio, when recorded.
hints.difficulty: Helps people choose a session that matches their experience.
hints.practice: The practice type — meditation, breathing, yoga, and so on. Used for browsing.
hints.focus: The emotional theme or intention — how the session feels in the library.
hints.instructor: The name shown as the guide for this session.
hints.environment: The setting or atmosphere — e.g. indoor, outdoor, nature.
hints.backgroundMusic: The mood or style of background sound — e.g. ambient, silence.
hints.backgroundMusicCreator: Optional credit for the music or sound used.
hints.accessTier: Who can access this session in the app — free or paid tiers.
hints.tags: Optional keywords for discovery. Separate with commas.

duration.label: Duration
duration.helper: This will be updated automatically after you upload audio or video.

media.title: Media
media.lede: Add either audio or video, plus a required cover image.
media.readonly: Media can only be changed while this session is a draft.
media.hintAudio: Add the guided audio for this session.
media.hintCover: Required before publishing. Helps people recognize your session.
media.hintAudioBlocked: Remove the current video first, then you can add audio.
media.hintVideoBlocked: Remove the current audio first, then you can add video.
media.hintPrimaryConflict: Both audio and video are attached. Remove one to continue.
media.primaryConflict: This session has both audio and video. Remove one to continue.
media.uploadFlowNote: When you choose a file, it uploads to secure storage immediately, then links to your draft. Removing a file deletes it from storage.
media.confirmRemoveBody: The file will be deleted from storage and unlinked from this draft.
media.audioUnsupported: Your browser does not support audio playback.

mediaError.config: File uploads are not configured yet. Contact your Studio admin.
mediaError.auth: Your session expired. Please sign in again and try again.
mediaError.attachPending: Upload completed, but attaching it to the session failed.
mediaError.attach: The media uploaded successfully, but could not be attached to this session. Please try again.
mediaError.network: Could not connect. Check your connection and try again.
mediaError.noPermission: You do not have permission to upload media for this session.
mediaError.exclusivePrimaryMedia: Only one of audio or video is allowed for each session.

mediaValidation.tooLarge: This file is too large. Please choose one under {maxMb} MB.
mediaValidation.audioFormat: Please upload an MP3 or M4A audio file.
mediaValidation.exclusivePrimaryMedia: Only one of audio or video is allowed for each session.
mediaValidation.removeOtherPrimaryFirst: Remove the other media type first, then add this one.

preview.title: Preview
preview.lede: A glimpse of how this session may feel in the Inigo library.
preview.descriptionPlaceholder: Your description will appear here in the library.
preview.mediaConflict: Audio and video attached — keep only one
preview.mediaNone: Add audio or video in Media
preview.notePrimary: Add audio or video in Media to complete the experience preview.
preview.notePrimaryConflict: Remove either audio or video in Media — only one is allowed.
preview.noteCover: A cover image is required before you can publish this session.

validation.title: Please add a title.
validation.description: Description should be at least a few words.
